title: Table data is lost on DB restart, but only when a table has 2147483647 or more rows.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(test_column INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table(test_column, name) SELECT seq AS test_column, 'Test Name' FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS seq FROM information_schema.tables LIMIT 2147483647) AS temp;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE test_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(test_column) FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Data loss on DB restart with large table row count
